name: Patient Case
history: Recent move and stress related to settling into a new living space. Difficult relationship with parents, especially mother, described as judgmental and emotionally unsupportive. Friendships have become strained, contributing to isolation.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: If I ask for help, I will be judged or rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't rely on anyone; I have to do everything myself.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of social interactions and emotional withdrawal.
situation: Feeling exhausted after attempting to unpack without support from friends. Avoiding contact with friends and the mother.
auto_thought: I can't do this on my own, but no one will help me.
behavior: Avoiding contact with friends and family.
